sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14905" key="a)/rdă" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄρδᾰ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ης</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14905.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dirt,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὴν ἄρδαν ἀπ᾽ ἐμοῦ σπόγγισον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">53</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
